overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit night market alley, interacting with a food vendor, ascending concrete stairs, and emerging into a wide plaza dominated by a massive circular spaceport structure. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with red lanterns, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow night market alley with food stalls and red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market alley, passing food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking ahead through the alley

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead illuminating the alley
food preparation counter with steam rising from cooking equipment
purple neon hotel sign visible in the distance above the alley
wet reflective asphalt surface showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. The player walks forward through the market area, passing food stalls on the left and various pedestrians. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lighting, creating a dense atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with open cooking station and digital menus

events.description: dialogue interaction initiated with food vendor showing trade options on UI

agents.ego_description: approaching and briefly interacting with the food vendor before continuing toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a conical hat standing behind the cooking station preparing food

entered.detail: food stall with cooking equipment, pots, and steam rising from grills
holographic digital menu displaying food items above the stall
bright green plastic stools arranged in front of the food counter
concrete staircase leading upward visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a specific food vendor stall where a vendor in a conical hat is cooking. A dialogue interaction occurs around 24 seconds, showing game UI options. The area features green stools, digital menu screens, and cooking equipment. The neon hotel sign becomes more prominent as the player moves toward the concrete stairs visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with graffiti leading to upper level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while moving away from the market area below

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
metal storage racks and shelving units along the right wall
covered corridor entrance at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the vendor area and approaches a concrete stairwell. Beginning at 35 seconds, the player ascends the stairs, passing graffiti-covered walls and metal shelving. The environment transitions from the busy market to a quieter, more industrial concrete structure leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive circular spaceport structure and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits enclosed corridor into open plaza revealing massive circular spaceport structure
camera tilts upward to view the top of the illuminated spaceport structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the plaza and looking up at the massive circular structure overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead into the plaza toward the structure

entered.detail: enormous circular spaceport structure with glowing ring and support towers dominating the skyline
curved elevated transit bridge arching across the top of the frame
metal railings along the edge of the elevated plaza area
large holographic advertisements floating above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a vast open plaza, revealing a breathtaking view of a massive circular spaceport structure towering overhead. The camera tilts up around 52 seconds to take in the full scale of the illuminated ring structure against the night sky, with holographic advertisements and an overhead transit bridge framing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit market alley into a vast, open plaza dominated by futuristic architecture. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor of red paper lanterns and food stalls, where the wet pavement reflects the vibrant glow of surrounding neon signs. As the camera approaches a food vendor in a conical hat, the scene shifts from the general bustle of the market toward a specific interaction area filled with digital menus and green stools. The perspective then transitions away from the vendor to ascend a concrete stairwell, passing graffiti-covered walls as the environment shifts from a crowded commercial hub to a quiet, industrial climb. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor into a wide plaza, tilting upward to reveal a massive, illuminated circular spaceport structure and holographic advertisements towering against the night sky.
